meaning: 中国国际信托投资公司
examples: Citic Securities has chosen the latter.
Chinese investment trust Citic Securities, up 481%, leads the list of Global 2000 stock market stars.
Brokerages were lower, with Haitong Securities down 2.9% and Citic Securities fell 2.1%.
Among banks, China Citic Bank Corp. fell 1.4%, and Bank of China Ltd. shed 1% in Shanghai.
